---
title: Modelling active travel with efficient, future-proof tools
abstract: Details to follow.
date: 2025-11-18 10:05:00+01:00
tags:
  - "Transport"
  - "Micromobility"
  - "Active Travel"
author: ["Robin Lovelace"]
---
## Modelling active travel with efficient, future-proof tools

**Event:** ETH Zürich Colloquium

**Location:** ETH Zürich, Campus Hoenggerberg

**Date:** 2025-11-18 10:05:00+01:00

A talk at the colloquium following Eva Heinen's inaugural lecture at ETH Zürich.
